name: SoftJunk Custom Sequence Preview
purpose: Generate a free custom lead follow-up preview, a shareable order link, and a PayPal note before the buyer pays for the full 7-day sequence.
paid_sequence_adds: Final copy tuned to one business and lead context
paypal_note_template: Custom Sequence Preview | Business: [business] | Service: [service] | Source: [source] | Tone: [tone] | Need: [blocker] | Next: [next] | Value: [value]
privacy_rule: Do not put customer names, phone numbers, addresses, private customer details, or PayPal transaction details in public URLs.
fulfillment_rule: Do not mark the order paid, started, or delivered unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
